game_info.title: Friday Night Funkin' P5
game_info.concept:
Want to spend some time with your Girlfriend? Too bad, your rhythmic skills are being challenged by just about every nasty goon on planet earth. So you'll need to flex your skills and hit notes in time with the music, or the only place you'll be spending your friday is the hospital.

App Store URL: https://apps.apple.com/us/app/friday-night-funkin-mobile/id6740428530

================================================================================
Full Description:
================================================================================

Want to spend some time with your Girlfriend? Too bad, your rhythmic skills are being challenged by just about every nasty goon on planet earth. So you'll need to flex your skills and hit notes in time with the music, or the only place you'll be spending your friday is the hospital.

DADDY DON'T PLAY NICE
In this story you play as BOYFRIEND who's trying to spend some time with no other than GIRLFRIEND. Bummer her evil, twisted freak of a father would sooner put you to rest than ever allow it. And it's not just him, go through the story and meet the many disturbed and backwards dopes who'd try to stand in your way. 


BANGIN' SOUNDTRACK
Enjoy the music that's made waves online, and learn it to a T as you put your rhythm to the test hitting notes in time. Largely composed by KawaiSprite and Saruky, with industry talent collaborations like Lotus Juice of 'Persona 3' fame and Kohta Takahashi of 'Ridge Racer 4' fame. With over 60+ original songs currently in the game, there's plenty to master. 


INTERACTIVE CARTOON EXCELLENCE
Hand drawn, lovingly made 2D visuals. Every stage unique, every enemy special, and made right in Adobe Flash. The art and animations of PhantomArcade bring the Newgrounds spirit to phones in full force. And with more levels, cutscenes, and playable characters on the way... the amount of eye candy The Funkin Crew will bring has no end in sight.

The internet classic with 200+ million players is finally here on the App Store, in its best form yet





Other features include

+ Gameplay overseen by Tom Fulp

+ Code by Ninjamuffin99

+ Sky Mod (wait thats not in this)

+ JohnnyUtah voice acting

+ Hot(?) characters!

+ 18 years worth of gameplay
game_info.description: Welcome to Friday Night Funkin' P5 Edition! You play as Boyfriend, trying to win over your Girlfriend by battling her ex-rockstar father in a rhythm battle. Notes will scroll up from the bottom of the screen. Press the corresponding arrow keys exactly when the colored arrows overlap the gray target outlines at the top. Keep the health bar green to win! If the bar turns fully red, you lose.
game_info.controls:
- Arrow Left: Hit Left (Purple) Note
- Arrow Down: Hit Down (Blue) Note
- Arrow Up: Hit Up (Green) Note
- Arrow Right: Hit Right (Red) Note
- Enter: Start Game / Retry
- ESC: Pause / Unpause
- R: Restart Game (from Game Over screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Verify perfect gameplay capability by simulating a bot that hits every note accurately.
TEST_1.strategy_description: The test bot scans the `gameState.notes` array for player notes. When a note enters the "Perfect" hit window (based on Y position relative to the receptor), the bot triggers the corresponding arrow key press.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: The player should not miss any notes, the score should increase consistently, the health bar should remain largely green (full health), and the game should eventually result in a win or high score survival.

TEST_2.test_description: Verify lose condition handling by simulating an idle/incompetent player.
TEST_2.strategy_description: The bot intentionally does nothing or presses random keys infrequently, letting notes pass by.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: The health bar should rapidly decrease (turn red) as notes are missed. The game phase should transition to "GAME_OVER_LOSE".
